description_long: This traffic barricade consists of a sturdy A-frame structure made primarily of metal, with two rectangular panels featuring diagonal orange and white reflective stripes. The panels are bolted to the frame, with the lower panel appearing partially detached and hanging at an angle. At the top of the barricade, a round amber warning light is mounted on a yellow base, designed to increase visibility in low-light conditions. The metal frame shows signs of weathering and use, with visible rust and grime, especially around the joints and edges. The overall design is utilitarian, intended to block or redirect pedestrian and vehicular traffic in urban environments.
description: A weathered metal A-frame traffic barricade with orange and white diagonal stripes and a mounted amber warning light.
description_view_0: Front view showing both striped panels, the top warning light, and the lower panel hanging loose.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the A-frame structure, the thickness of the panels, and the profile of the warning light.
description_view_2: Rear view with the warning light visible, the lower panel hanging at an angle, and the frame's crossbar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the A-frame profile and the mounting of the panels and light.
attribute_reflective_striping_pattern: Diagonal orange and white stripes, alternating, medium width, repeated across both panels.
